biological_replicate: n = 4 comparing plasma MP proteins from non-infected mice (NI, n = 4)
technical_replicate: The protocol established with the TMT0 was then translated to the TMTsixplex (TMT6) format.
experimental_design: non-infected vs PbA-infected at different time points

comparing plasma MP proteins from non-infected mice (NI, n = 4), PbA-infected mice at day 3 post-infection (d3 pi, n = 4) and PbA-infected mice at d8 post-infection when all the signs of cerebral malaria are detected (ECM, n = 4).
factor_value: comparing plasma MP proteins from non-infected mice (NI, n = 4), PbA-infected mice at day 3 post-infection (d3 pi, n = 4) and PbA-infected mice at d8 post-infection when all the signs of cerebral malaria are detected (ECM, n = 4).
number_of_biological_replicates: n = 4 comparing plasma MP proteins from non-infected mice (NI, n = 4)
